settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Switch the interface language. Changes will be applied immediately.

upload.title: Import vMessageRecord CSV
upload.description: Drag and drop a file here, or click the upload box below to choose one. Parsing, indexing, and filtering all happen locally in your browser.
upload.hint: If drag and drop does not respond, use the file picker above.

csvMapping.caption: CSV Import
csvMapping.title: No header detected, please map the fields manually
csvMapping.description: The first CSV row could not be recognized as a header. Please map the fields and make sure type and timestamp are included.
csvMapping.duplicateColumns: The same column cannot be mapped to multiple fields.

index.title: vMessageRecord Chat History Analyzer
index.description: Import CSV files generated or exported by the vMessageRecord plugin to analyze chat activity on your Velocity network. Browse the overview, player profiles, server profiles, private conversations, player timelines, and filtered records.
index.importedDescription: {file} was loaded successfully. To replace it, use '{action}' in the top-right corner.
index.latestRecordsDescription: The 10 most recent records in descending time order

records.title: Records
records.emptyDescription: Go back to the overview page and import a vMessageRecord CSV file first.

player.listDescription: Sorted by total record count, with filters for last server, time range, type, and keywords.
player.emptyDescription: Import a CSV file from the overview page before browsing player profiles.
player.searchPlaceholder: Search player name / UUID / prefixes / suffixes / last server / type
player.notFoundDescription: Check whether the player name is correct, or import a CSV that contains this player's records.

server.listDescription: Inspect activity, message volume, join/leave counts, and active players for each server.
server.emptyDescription: Go back to the overview page and import a vMessageRecord CSV file first.
server.notFoundDescription: Check whether the server name is correct, or import a CSV that contains this server's records.

conversation.emptyTitle: No conversation found for this pair
conversation.emptyDescription: Make sure the current import contains PRIVATE_MESSAGE records for these two players.
conversation.title: Conversation

recordPage.notFoundDescription: The current data may have been cleared, or this record is not part of the current import.
